visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a woman with long dark hair, wearing a mauve-colored ribbed top. She holds a smartphone with a sticker-covered case, smiling into the front camera. The background is a brightly lit but softly blurred indoor studio space resembling a cafe with warm overhead lighting and wooden furniture. (2) A close-up "insert shot" of the smartphone screen reveals the woman's smiling face, specifically highlighting a smudge of bright red lipstick on her upper front tooth. A yellow cartoon "sparkle" graphic appears next to the tooth. The lighting is bright and even, focusing entirely on the dental mishap and the character's squinting, happy eyes. (3) The woman is seen in a medium close-up, looking directly at the camera with a shocked and embarrassed expression. She holds a white paper tissue and begins wiping her front teeth vigorously. Her hand movements are quick and frantic, while her facial muscles show a mix of surprise and mock annoyance at the situation. (4) The scene cuts to an outdoor urban setting with a high-angle "POV" style shot of the woman. Strong wind gusts blow her long dark hair across her face and mouth. She tries to brush the hair away with her hands while blinking against the wind. The background shows a modern city skyline under a clear blue sky. (5) A macro close-up focus on the woman's nose and cheek area highlights the skin texture and the appearance of "floating" or dry foundation makeup. Her fingers are seen pointing to the dry patches. The lighting is harsh natural daylight, making the makeup imperfections clearly visible against her skin. (6) The woman stands in front of a digital green-screen background featuring the Taipei 101 building. She holds a white and gold "La glow" bottle towards the camera. She uses wide, energetic hand gestures to explain the product benefits. The lighting is bright and flat, characteristic of a professional studio setup for social media promotion. (7) Close-up shots of hands demonstrate the product's texture. A pump of white cream is applied to the back of a hand, and as it is rubbed in, it visibly transforms into clear water droplets on the skin surface. The lighting is bright and focused on the hands and the moisture effect, with high detail on the skin's surface. (8) The final phase shows a montage of before-and-after skin comparison photos, followed by a return to the woman standing outdoors. She smiles broadly, holding the product next to her face and giving a "thumbs up" gesture. The Taipei 101 landmark remains clearly visible in the background, under bright, warm afternoon sunlight.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV. 女生爆氣瞬間Top3. (2) [Subtitle]: (認真在自拍中). (3) [Subtitle]: TOP3. 牙齒被沾到唇彩的時候. (4) [Variety]: (逃走). (5) [Subtitle]: TOP2. 粉撲掉地上的時候. (6) [Slogan]: 妝容完成! (7) [Subtitle]: TOP3. 一出門頭髮黏在臉上. (8) [Subtitle]: 甚至妝還開始浮粉!. (9) [Subtitle]: 到底為什麼這樣?. (10) [Subtitle]: 你還不知道原因嗎?. (11) [Subtitle]: 是因為基礎保養產品選錯了. (12) [Slogan]: 台灣夏天又悶又熱. (13) [Logo]: La glow. (14) [Slogan]: La glow 煥齡修護雪凝乳. (15) [Variety]: 一抹就爆水. (16) [Subtitle]: (前) 皮膚很粗糙!. (17) [Subtitle]: (後) 自然光澤肌. (18) [Slogan]: 保濕撫紋都很有感!!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting and demonstrating the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young East Asian woman with long black hair and bangs, initially wearing a mauve ribbed top, then a light yellow shirt over a white inner top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between a blurred indoor cafe/studio, a windy outdoor urban street, and a digital background featuring the Taipei 101 skyline.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy, uptempo electronic pop background music track featuring a driving synthetic beat. A young female speaker delivers a high-pitched, enthusiastic greeting with a rapid speech rate and bright vocal timbre. This is immediately accompanied by a sharp, metallic "ding" sound effect that signals the start of the countdown. (2) A comedic "slide whistle" descending sound effect occurs simultaneously with the visual of lipstick on teeth, followed by a playful, exaggerated groan from the speaker. The BGM continues steadily underneath, while the vocal delivery shifts to a teasing, self-deprecating tone with higher pitch variability and frequent expressive pauses to emphasize the awkward moment. (3) A synthetic "whoosh" transition sound triggers as the scene shifts to an outdoor environment. A subtle wind-like noise floor is layered in the mix. The speaker’s voice-over increases in volume and arousal, expressing frustration at the wind. The BGM remains energetic, but the vocal track dominates the mix with a clear, projected delivery style. (4) A bright, percussive "sparkle" or magic-style sound effect marks the introduction of the product. The speaker's tone transitions to a professional, persuasive narrative style with very high articulation clarity. Each product benefit is highlighted by a subtle "pop" or "click" sound effect, perfectly synchronized with on-screen text overlays, while the BGM provides a consistent rhythmic bed. (5) The final phase features a swell in the background music's volume as the speaker delivers an enthusiastic concluding call to action. Her voice exhibits a very positive valence and high dominance. A final "shimmer" sound effect plays as the brand name is mentioned, and the audio concludes with a sharp hard cut that eliminates all noise and music instantly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based -> Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Social Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a relatable 'Top 3 annoying moments' listicle format to hook the audience, specifically targeting common summer makeup and skincare frustrations such as lipstick on teeth and foundation caking. It then transitions into a product demonstration for 'La glow' moisturizer, presenting it as the high-performance solution to skin dehydration in hot weather, utilizing visual 'bursting water' effects and before-and-after results to build trust and encourage a purchase decision.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly introduces and demonstrates the product features, benefits, and results, using the brand name clearly in speech and overlays.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production-value social media advertisement combining meme-style humor with professional skincare demonstration.
